channel.title: 10 Years on xuanjin
channel.description: Recent content in 10 Years on xuanjin

item.title: Know me by my name
item.description: Name is interesting, isn’t it? In English, each name comes from Greek tale, or Bible or the changing form of it. Name is interesting, some people say Name is just a label, it is just a name. However, I don’t agree, name is more than just a label, there is a reason we don’t call people NO.123456789, you know, there is a reason why inmates in the prison is only labeled with numbers.

item.title: English
item.description: I was thinking about writing a short story, but for days, I don’t know what to write about. I cannot even start a story with a short story prompt, then why not start writing something about me? English is one of my favorite languages, I mean, Chinese is my other favorite, and don’t get me wrong, I do love my own culture and Chinese is a beautiful language, especially when you write things out.

item.title: Life is just like a book --- Pre
item.description: 10 years, what does 10 years mean to you? 10 years — a decade, seems to be long, but also short when you look back. Time does fly, doesn’t it? 10 years can change people a lot, 10 years. Where were you 10 years ago? Where are you now? Where will you be in 10 years? I am at the point where I don’t know where I will be next, however, I did love every single minutes I spent in the US.
